summary: Iteration 21 - FinalPreview Feature Testing Complete. All 12 features verified successfully: FinalPreview component with channel mockups (WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook), channel selector switching, image selector, Publicar Campanha button, Voltar ao Pipeline navigation, and Marketing campaigns page with enhanced cards showing dates and channel badges.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor Recharts sizing issue (existing issue from previous iterations)

seed_data_creation: Used existing completed pipeline from previous test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: FinalPreview feature fully tested. Key data-testids: 'open-final-preview' (Ver Preview Final button), 'final-preview' (FinalPreview container), 'preview-channel-whatsapp/instagram/facebook' (channel selector buttons), 'mockup-whatsapp/instagram/facebook' (mockup containers), 'publish-campaign-btn' (Publicar Campanha button). Pipeline tab accessed via 'mode-pipeline-tab'. Marketing page at /marketing shows campaign cards with dates and channel badges.

login_and_navigate.notes: Login with test@agentflow.com works, enterprise plan confirmed

pipeline_tab_with_completed_pipeline.notes: Pipeline tab (data-testid='mode-pipeline-tab') shows completed pipeline with 100% progress and 'Ver Preview Final' button

ver_preview_final_button.notes: Button visible at bottom of pipeline view, clicking opens FinalPreview component

final_preview_component.notes: Component displays with header 'Preview Final da Campanha'

channel_selector_tabs.notes: All three channel buttons present and clickable

features_verified: Profile header with gradient border (Instagram colors)
AgentZZ with 'Patrocinado' badge and globe icon

channel_switching.notes: Clicking channel buttons correctly changes the displayed mockup. WhatsApp->Instagram->Facebook all work

image_selector.notes: Three image thumbnails shown at bottom of mockup area (labeled 'IMAGEM:'). Clicking switches the image in the mockup

publicar_campanha_button.notes: Gold gradient button at bottom with checkmark icon, text 'Publicar Campanha'

voltar_ao_pipeline_button.notes: Button text 'Voltar ao Pipeline' visible, clicking returns to pipeline steps view

features_verified.dates_shown: Cards show dates like '19 de mar', '27 de abr - 30 de abr'
features_verified.channel_badges: WhatsApp, Instagram, Email badges with correct colors
features_verified.ai_studio_button: AI Studio button present for enterprise users
